headline: Marriott (MAR) Stock Looks Overvalued On Cash Flow And Earnings
summary: Marriott International’s share price has delivered a strong 166.9% return over the past 5 years, yet both the Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate and market multiples currently point to the stock trading at a premium rather than at a clear discount. Over 5 years, Marriott International has returned 166.9%, which puts fresh attention on whether today’s price still leaves much room for additional upside before valuation becomes stretched. New projects such as the planned...
